title: Vintage Travel Stamp Illustration
sourceTitle: Floating City Postage Stamp Diorama AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Miniature floating city diorama of New York emerging from a vintage postage stamp. Subject: New York rises from the stamp surface as a compact island city sculpture, with Manhattan skyline, Brooklyn Bridge, Central Park, harbor boats, art deco towers blended into a dense but elegant miniature urban landscape. Scene: Vintage postage stamp transformed into a hyper-realistic 3D paper-craft city world with iconic architecture, bridges, parks, waterfront promenades, boats, tiny people, crystal-blue waterways, and cultural districts. Composition: Fixed cinematic aerial poster composition: large vintage stamp base at a dramatic angle, city island rising from the stamp, landmarks stacked in compact depth, water and boats wrapping the miniature landscape, and soft clouds surrounding the floating form. Signature Elements: New York, Manhattan skyline, Brooklyn Bridge, Central Park, harbor boats, art deco towers, vintage postage stamp base, floating compact island city, miniature architecture, waterways, tiny people, boats, golden sunrise, volumetric clouds, and premium 3D paper-craft diorama finish. Style: Ultra-detailed miniature floating-city diorama, hyper-realistic 3D paper-craft sculpture, premium travel collectible, cinematic aerial perspective, intricate urban detail, and high-end museum display finish. Color Palette: Vintage stamp cream, sunrise gold, soft cloud white, crystal blue waterways, natural park greens, city-specific architecture colors, and warm reflective highlights. Lighting: Golden sunrise lighting, soft volumetric clouds, atmospheric haze, realistic reflections on waterways, and gentle shadowing under the miniature city structures. Camera: Cinematic aerial three-quarter view with deep miniature scale, readable landmarks, visible stamp border, and a magical floating-island effect. Materials: Vintage stamp paper, paper-craft architecture, tiny bridges, glossy waterways, miniature trees, boats, city monuments, soft cloud vapor, and realistic reflected surfaces. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
